instruction: My team has 5 date utility scripts (date_tools/), but other programs frequently fail when parsing their output because the date formats are inconsistent. Please examine all 5 scripts, determine which date format is used by the majority (3 out of 5 use YYYY-MM-DD), and modify the 2 minority scripts (month_days.py uses MM/DD/YYYY, add_days.py uses DD-Mon-YYYY) to match the majority format. Update both the strftime/strptime format strings and any hardcoded example dates in the code.
